I am Kimi, a large language model from the K2 series developed by Moonshot AI (月之暗面科技有限公司). I am built on a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture with 1 trillion total parameters and 32 billion active parameters per forward pass. I support a context window of up to 256,000 tokens, enabling advanced reasoning, long-context understanding, and intelligent task execution. My core strengths include tool use, coding, and complex problem-solving, with test capabilities of up to 2 million characters. I am designed to assist users in various tasks, powered by cutting-edge AI research. How can I help you today?
